purpose: Gate tier for hamzated/weak/doubled-root decisions. norm() over-recalls weak roots; certification needs norm_strict + QAC, never the lenient key.

rules.when: the root would be inferred from norm() alone for a weak/hamza stem (إِلَيْنَا→ل ي ن; إيمان/أيمان; قُرْءَانًا+نا)
hamza-seat distinction is meaning-bearing (أ/إ/ؤ/ئ/ء) and could collapse under norm()
hollow/defective/assimilated root whose radical is hidden/alternating (قَالَ ق-و-ل; دَعَا د-ع-و; يَجِدُ و-ج-د)
rules.note: recover the radical from QAC/the family before authoring

rules.when: QAC root+POS confirm the weak root AND a single Qamus sense applies AND no homograph
QAC root/POS contradicts the proposed reading
